description: Registry of source inputs Dutiva ingests or tracks for the Advisor and internal HR document systems.

sources.notes: MVP source. Local raw file: advisor-training/raw-laws/canada/federal/acts/L-2.xml. Included in parsed, normalized, guidance, and data/advisor-guidance-index.json outputs.
MVP source. Local raw file: advisor-training/raw-laws/canada/federal/acts/H-6.xml. Included in parsed, normalized, guidance, and data/advisor-guidance-index.json outputs.
MVP source. Local raw file: advisor-training/raw-laws/canada/federal/regulations/C.R.C.-c-986.xml. Included in parsed, normalized, guidance, and data/advisor-guidance-index.json outputs.

sources.source_name: Work Place Harassment and Violence Prevention Regulations
sources.notes: Tracked for Phase 1b. The source is available on Justice Laws, but local raw XML has not been added and this regulation is not yet included in the guidance index.
Official ESDC/Labour Program guide source tracked for future guided-content ingestion. It is not currently part of the MVP law XML pipeline.
Tracked source for Ontario employment standards coverage. Local raw ingestion and guidance-index inclusion still need a future source-ingestion pass.

sources.source_name: Your guide to the Employment Standards Act
sources.notes: Official Ontario guide source tracked for future guided-content ingestion and source-citation review.
Tracked source for Quebec labour-standards coverage. Local raw ingestion and guidance-index inclusion still need a future source-ingestion pass.
Tracked source for Quebec French-language workplace, contract, and policy obligations. Review before moving Quebec templates from partial to full coverage.
Internal source library for generated HR documents. Current template set is stored under src/lib/generator/templates with paired TypeScript and generated JavaScript files.

sources.source_name: Dutiva Advisor safety and escalation policies
sources.notes: Internal policy source for legal-boundary and escalation behavior. Files include advisor-training/safety/legal-boundaries.md and advisor-training/safety/escalation-rules.md.

sources.source_name: Dutiva Canadian HR compliance knowledge base
sources.notes: Internal best-practice guidance source for Canadian HR compliance and jurisdictional framing. Files include advisor-training/knowledge-base/canadian-hr-compliance.md and jurisdictions.md.

sources.source_name: Dutiva Advisor response style and example guidance
sources.notes: Internal communications guidance source for Advisor tone, response structure, and example responses. Related files live under advisor-training/prompts and advisor-training/examples.
